logoSvg.description: SVG code or Data URI for the branding logo

subText.description: Subtext or brand owner (A Brand of Mopheth)

updatedAt.description: When the branding setting was last updated

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Purchase transaction records placed by guests or authenticated club members

userId.description: Unique identifier of the customer in Firebase Authentication

customerName.description: Billing full name of the guest

items.description: List of food items inside the luxury transaction

status.description: Simulated or actual progress prep log status

timestamp.description: Creation unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds

User.title: User
User.description: User profile with roles and account states

CustomMenu.title: CustomMenu
CustomMenu.description: Custom user created fine dining menu items

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Custom dining filters and category definitions

Asset.title: Asset
Asset.description: Media assets and imagery saved on the site

InstagramPost.title: InstagramPost
InstagramPost.description: Media item retrieved from the Instagram Basic Display API or custom configured fine art pieces

AnalyticsEvent.title: AnalyticsEvent
AnalyticsEvent.description: User engagement and reservation conversion metric actions logged securely across the system

eventType.description: The type of metric / engagement logged

pathName.description: The current URL pathname or screen locator

sessionUid.description: Unique session placeholder to group events anonymously or by individual user ID

ShippingArea.title: ShippingArea
ShippingArea.description: Shipping regions with corresponding delivery fees inside Lagos state

id.description: Unique identifier of the shipping area matching name slug

name.description: The name of the Lagos location

fee.description: The custom delivery fee in NGN

isMainland.description: Whether the location belongs to Lagos Mainland

Rider.title: Rider
Rider.description: Logistics dispatch rider profile with credentials and status

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Real-time direct chat messages exchanged between courier rider and customer during a delivery trip

senderId.description: Sender identifier, either rider username, user UID, or descriptive string

senderName.description: Full name or display name of the message sender

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 string representation of creation date-time

SupportChat.title: SupportChat
SupportChat.description: Session document for live contact support chats between client/guests and service desk

support_chats/{chatId}.description: Active help-desk communication sessions for live assistance

support_chats/{chatId}/messages/{message.description: Sequence logs of help-desk messages exchanged with support staff

orders/{orderId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Real-time communication logs between tracking guest/user and assigned courier rider

shipping_areas/{areaId}.description: Shipping regions with corresponding delivery fees inside Lagos State

settings/{settingId}.description: Collection of global app system settings, branding, and config

orders/{orderId}.description: Secure collection storing order transaction paths validated to matching authenticated owner UIDs only

users/{userId}.description: Users tracking profiles storing specific clearance roles like admin, sales, chef, or user.

menus/{menuId}.description: Menus created and managed by administrators that auto-inject into the live store display

categories/{categoryId}.description: Dining categories created and managed by administrators to organize menus

assets/{assetId}.description: Site-wide image assets stored in Firebase for dynamic media lists

instagram_posts/{postId}.description: Live feed of culinary snapshots synchronized from the real brand Instagram account via token API proxy

analytics_events/{eventId}.description: Central collection housing user engagement log entries and conversion metrics

riders/{riderId}.description: Logistics dispatch rider credential accounts and active status toggles
